name: Wise
description: Wise — International money transfer and multi-currency account platform with low-FX-fee transfers to 80+ countries via bank rails.

seo.title: Wise — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Wise: Wise — International money transfer and multi-currency account platform with low-FX-fee transfers to 80+ countries via bank rails.

when_to_use: International contractor payouts with mid-market FX rates
Multi-currency account management for global remote teams
Cross-border B2B payments to 80+ countries via bank rails
Mass payouts for global freelancer and gig platforms

pros: Solid Platform API for embedded transfers
cons: Platform API gated and slower onboarding
review.verdict: Best-value cross-border transfers and multi-currency accounts — just remember, it isn't a payment gateway for card acceptance.
review.best_for: Businesses doing international transfers and payouts needing low FX cost
review.not_for: Merchants needing to accept card payments from customers
